title: Financial Investment Analytics
summary: Analyzed investor risk-return behavior and built an interactive Power BI dashboard to improve visibility of key insights compared to raw tables.
highlights: Identified high-return seekers were ~1.5× more likely to prefer Equity Markets; top 3 avenues ~70% of preferences.
Transformed raw survey data (40 investors) into a structured dataset using SQL (cleaning, normalization, schema).
Segmented demographics: ~50% in 26–35 age group; ~35–40% classified as high-risk via a rule-based equity ranking model.

title: Accident Detection & Alert System (YOLOv8)
summary: Built a real-time accident detection system with automated alerts and a responsive web UI.
highlights: Achieved 92% detection accuracy on test datasets; trained on 5,000+ labeled traffic images.
Built a Flask backend for image processing and model inference; reduced detection time by ~40%.
Integrated automated email alerts, reducing emergency response delay by ~35%; published a research paper.

title: IPL Data Analysis (Internship Project)
summary: Cleaned match data, performed EDA, and delivered interactive Power BI dashboards for player/team performance insights.
highlights: Improved data quality by ~95% through cleaning (missing values, duplicates).
Designed dashboards for top scorers/wicket-takers, team & season comparisons, and match outcomes.
Increased data clarity by ~80% and reduced analysis time by ~40% using modular analysis workflow.

title: Retail Sales Data Analysis
summary: Exploratory analysis of retail sales to understand trends, seasonality, and key drivers.
highlights: Performed cleaning and feature exploration to surface patterns across time, category, and customer behavior.
Built visuals to communicate KPI movement and actionable segments.

title: Housing Price Prediction
summary: End-to-end workflow for predicting house prices with data preprocessing, EDA, and model training.
highlights: Prepared data with preprocessing and feature engineering, then trained baseline regression models.
Evaluated model performance and documented key drivers impacting predicted price.

title: Other GitHub Notebooks
summary: Additional exploratory notebooks and learning projects on GitHub.
highlights: See GitHub for more repositories and ongoing work.
